name: Seal the Night Rider
description: Meet “Seal” this horse comes once every five years, it only appears at the 11th hour this night rider comes like a thief in the night if you catch him in action you may not go to the moon, even better you’ll find yourself in Utopia a place where dreams come true! This the first ever appearance of the Night rider allegedly one of the 7 great wonders of the earth, catch him now or cry for ever!
